name: Hawaiian Sweet-And-Sour Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Garlic powder or minced garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together beef, eggs, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, onion, pepper, nutmeg, salt, and garlic. Form into 1-inch balls.
2. Heat oil in a skillet; brown meatballs on all sides.
3. In a large saucepan, combine remaining cornstarch, soy sauce, vinegar, water, and brown sugar with pineapple juice. Cook until thickened; stir constantly.
4. Add meatballs, fruit, and peppers. Cook 5 minutes or until the fruit is well heated.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
